name: Hazer Group Limited
description: Hazer Group Limited is an Australian pioneer in commercialising a low-emission hydrogen and graphite production process. The company's proprietary Hazer Process enables the conversion of natural gas and similar feedstocks into hydrogen and high-quality synthetic graphite, using iron ore as a process catalyst. This innovative technology offers a clean alternative to traditional hydrogen production methods, significantly reducing carbon dioxide emissions while producing valuable graphite for various industrial applications.
